note: Claude fills these from news + live quotes. signal_sim trades any signal with direction in (bullish,bearish), confidence >= 0.6, already_priced_in == false, and no open position. If an OPEN position's signal flips to already_priced_in==true (or is removed), signal_sim exits it at market next run. Percent levels are relative to live entry price.

scenarios.trigger: Hormuz disruption persists, oil holds > $78, energy keeps leading
oil consolidates at high level, XLE chops sideways
energy rolls over on profit-taking / ceasefire hopes, gives back the spike

key_risks: energy already sold off 7/16 (VLO -2.9%, PSX -2.6%, OXY -1.5%) after +11% oil run
sudden ceasefire collapses the oil premium
the geopolitical premium is now largely priced in
signals.reasoning: 能源在 7/16 全线回调（VLO -2.9%、PSX -2.6%、OXY -1.5%），油价三日 +11% 后的地缘溢价已基本 price in。继续做多的风险回报变差，标记为 already_priced_in=true —— 触发对持有中 XLE 多单的市价止损，及时抽身，不等硬止损。
